revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) SPEAKER ATTRIBUTION CORRECTION — The transcript labels lines at 00:55 through 01:23 as 'rep:' not 'customer:'. Stage 3 treats these as Doris's customer speech throughout cherry_pick_moments[4], multi_touch_patterns[0], and the starting_state/state_changes sections. Stage 3 must re-examine who is speaking these lines and revise the coaching reads accordingly. The corrected read — that the rep already knew the husband-as-decision-maker context before the call — is actually a stronger coaching indictment and should be surfaced as such. (2) MISSED VERIFY GAP — Stage 3 never surfaces the fact that zero verify items were completed on this call, and the rep made an unqualified 'no out of pocket cost' promise to a customer with no bill, no credit check, no roof age, and no utility company captured. This is a structural failure that outranks or equals the callback-locking gap in coaching priority. Add a cherry_pick_moment and coaching_focus item for the verify completion gap. (3) MISSED TIMELINE ANCHORS — Doris provides two concrete anchors (March/April move date at 01:41; 'after Christmas' process start at 01:44) that the rep never uses. Stage 3 does not surface either. Add these as missed leverage moments — the 'after Christmas' line in particular is a natural locked-callback opportunity the rep walked past. Secondary fix: correct the schema_reference in cherry_pick_moments[4] from coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline (wrong section) to a legitimacy/intro reference, and correct the outcome_dispute framing to remove the claim that a v1 tag was 'listed as unknown.'
